variants.title: HiFi Filter SAO 8666 Engine Breather Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAO 8666 Engine Breather Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAO 8666 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 7004 z Positive Crankcase Ventilation | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAO 8666
variants.description: Reliable crankcase ventilation filters from MANN-FILTER efficiently separate oil droplets from the blow-by gasses in the crankcase. This separation protects the intake system from contamination with oil and thus maintains its reliability.
